extra.reason: Implemented the V1 local-first foundation: Rust CLI/workspace, SQLite storage, four local importers, pricing snapshot/overrides, SSH remote configuration with read-only discovery, embedded React/Vite dashboard, tests, validation, and turn documentation. Follow-up remote import and fixture hardening are tracked separately.
Created a root README documenting dirtydash, the current V1 foundation, usage commands, limitations, and the forward roadmap.
Updated README with the supplied Project Roadmap, customized V1 to match the current repository state, and folded current limitations into roadmap status.

Reconciled DirtyDash with tokscale by importing Codex last_token_usage increments, splitting cached input out of prompt input, scanning archived Codex/OpenCode sources, pruning stale rows on reimport, and adding pricing aliases/rates. Validation: cargo fmt --check, cargo test, cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings; live reimport now reports about 2.677B tokens and ,624.21 all-time versus tokscale at about 2.680B tokens and ,624.40, with today's total about .54 versus tokscale about .73.

Updated README to keep dirtydash lowercase, merged Current State with the project roadmap near the top, converted roadmap milestones into a checklist, and removed the duplicate lower roadmap section.
